output.code:
# Let's read the file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-3BZp6s9t3Ab9yujA7BYqo8-Q135.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:2000]

# Find quoted segments
segments = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    segments.append((i, j+1, text[i:j+1]))
    start = j+1
segments, len(segments)

output.code:
# From earlier segments list, compute inner spans start, end (without quotes) and text
results = []
for i, j, s in segments:
    inner_start = i + 1
    inner_end = j - 0 - 1  # j is index of closing quote +1; content ends at j-1
    inner_text = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    results.append((inner_start, inner_end, inner_text))
results

import json

citations = []

# 1st Aya
citations.append({
    "span_start": 197,
    "span_end": 399,
    "span_text": "الرِجَالُ قَوَّامُونَ عَلَى النِسَاءِ بِمَا فَضَّلَ اللَّهُ بَعْضَهُمْ عَلَى بَعْضٍ وَبِمَا أَنفَقُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِمْ فَالصَالِحَاتُ قَانِتَاتٌ حَافِظَاتٌ لِلغَيْبِ وَالرَاضِعاتُ حَافِظَاتٌ فُرُجَاعٌ",
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "النساء", "sura_number": 4, "aya_number": 34},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "الرِّجَالُ قَوَّامُونَ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ بِمَا فَضَّلَ اللَّهُ بَعْضَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ وَبِمَا أَنْفَقُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِمْ ۚ فَالصَّالِحَاتُ قَانِتَاتٌ حَافِظَاتٌ لِلْغَيْبِ بِمَا حَفِظَ اللَّهُ ۚ وَاللَّاتِي تَخَافُونَ نُشُوزَهُنَّ فَعِظُوهُنَّ وَاهْجُرُوهُنَّ فِي الْمَضَاجِعِ وَاضْرِبُوهُنَّ ۖ فَإِنْ أَطَعْنَكُمْ فَلَا تَبْغُوا عَلَيْهِنَّ سَبِيلًا ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيًّا كَبِيرًا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 2nd Aya (fake At-Tahrim)
citations.append({
    "span_start": 434,
    "span_end": 867,
    "span_text": "وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وِلْدَانٌ قَاعِدَةٌ حَفِيٌّ بِزِينَةٍ مِنْ كُلِّ زِينَةٍ وَخُذُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ تُؤْتِيَنَّهُنَّ رِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَكُلُوا مِنْهُنَّ طَيِّبًا وَءَاتُوهُنَّ كِرَامًا وَبِصَبرٍ وَقُولُوا لِلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلْ لِأَزْوَاجِكَ وَبَنَاتِكَ وَنِسَاءِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ يُدْنِدْنَ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِنَّ شَيْئًا ذَلِكَ أَدْنَى أَلَزِمُهُنَّ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَمُتَعَلِّمَاتٍ",
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Hadith 1
citations.append({
    "span_start": 1008,
    "span_end": 1066,
    "span_text": "لَوْلاَ حُرِّمَتْ زَوَاجُ الأَخِ وَالْأُخْتِ لَزَوَّجْتُها",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Hadith 2
citations.append({
    "span_start": 1165,
    "span_end": 1240,
    "span_text": "وَلَوْلاَ أَنَّ اللَهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَمَرَ بِالنِسَاءِ لَمَسَحْنَ بِالأَذى",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Hadith 3 (repetition)
citations.append({
    "span_start": 1271,
    "span_end": 1454,
    "span_text": "لَوْلاَ أَنَّ اللَهَ أَمَرَ بِالنِسَاءِ لَمَسَحْنَ بِالأَذى وَلَوْلاَ أَنَّ اللَهَ أَمَرَ بِالنِسَاءِ لَمَسَحْنَ بِالأَذى وَلَوْلاَ أَنَّ اللَهَ أَمَرَ بِالنِسَاءِ لَمَسَحْنَ بِالأَذى",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Hadith 4
citations.append({
    "span_start": 1550,
    "span_end": 1603,
    "span_text": "أَلاَ تَغَرَّضوا بِالنِسَاءِ وَلاَ تَجَشَّموا بِهِنَّ",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
